name: Load Robot Cell From URDF/SRDF
description: Load a RobotCell from URDF + SRDF files on disk. Optionally points at a local mesh package folder for geometry. No ROS required.

inputParameters.name: urdf_filename
inputParameters.description: Absolute path to the URDF file.

inputParameters.name: srdf_filename
inputParameters.description: Absolute path to the SRDF file.

inputParameters.name: local_package_mesh_folder
inputParameters.description: Optional path to a local package folder holding the meshes referenced as `package://` in the URDF. Required for visualization.

inputParameters.name: reload
inputParameters.description: Force a reload (bypass cache). Defaults to False.
